recommendation_policy_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: ai_safety_policy states: no recommendations, no buy/sell/hold. M8R-05A implies canonical project output has no recommendations, but AI may analyze based on policy.
recommendation_policy_conflicts.reason: Project output is canonical; AI analysis is separate and allowed within policy limits.
recommendation_policy_conflicts.migration_action: Update ai_safety_policy to clarify difference between project canonical output and AI conversational capabilities.

smallest_sufficient_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: SKILL.md: choose smallest sufficient capability set. M8R-05A: exhaustive within authorized request scope.
smallest_sufficient_conflicts.reason: M8R-05A mandates bounded but comprehensive results.
smallest_sufficient_conflicts.migration_action: Remove smallest sufficient wording from SKILL and ai_safety_policy.

fixed_taxonomy_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: Guide uses fixed intents: quick, standard, deep. Schema uses granular targets and data_needs.
fixed_taxonomy_conflicts.migration_action: Remove fixed intents and migrate to M8R-05A data needs.

old_operation_vs_m8r_05a.exact_conflicting_semantics: SKILL uses describe_market_capabilities, get_current_market_evidence. M8R-05A uses Unified Request.
old_operation_vs_m8r_05a.migration_action: Map old operations to historical interfaces; update Skill to output Unified Request.

mode_abc_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: Mode A/B/C treated as AI intents vs Operator/Frontend workflow.
mode_abc_conflicts.reason: AI should not set mode; frontend handles inspection and execution.
mode_abc_conflicts.migration_action: Redefine Mode A/B/C as frontend workflow states.

level_12_conflicts.exact_conflicting_semantics: Level 1/2 treated as AI request parameter vs Evidence lifecycle metadata.
level_12_conflicts.reason: Level metadata is intrinsic to the evidence, not a user request.
level_12_conflicts.migration_action: Redefine Level 1/2 as metadata on the result payload.

duplicate_source_of_truth.migration_action: Deprecate quick_guide in favor of the JSON schema.
